title: Plett panga attack suspect arrested
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The police arrested a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The police arrested a 27-year-old suspect last night, Wednesday, 15 January, following the vicious panga attack on a couple strolling in Plettenberg Bay early on Tuesday morning.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The police arrested a 27-year-old suspect last night, Wednesday, 15 January, following the vicious panga attack on a couple strolling in Plettenberg Bay early on Tuesday morning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The man was arrested at 21:30 in Qolweni, Plettenberg Bay.","html":"The man was arrested at 21:30 in Qolweni, Plettenberg Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Captain FC van Wyk, Western Cape SAPS spokesperson, said the suspect will appear in court once charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Wyk said both the victims, a woman aged 70 and her husband 73, who were attacked in Challenge Drive at 05:10 on 14 January when they wouldn’t give up the woman’s handbag to the robber, have been discharged from hospital.","html":"Van Wyk said both the victims, a woman aged 70 and her husband 73, who were attacked in Challenge Drive at 05:10 on 14 January when they wouldn’t give up the woman’s handbag to the robber, have been discharged from hospital."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Otto Olivier, operations manager of the Plettenberg Bay Crime Prevention Association (PBCPA), posted a statement today describing the 73-year-old man as his hero, for fighting back to protect his wife.","html":"Otto Olivier, operations manager of the Plettenberg Bay Crime Prevention Association (PBCPA), posted a statement today describing the 73-year-old man as his hero, for fighting back to protect his wife."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Olivier wrote: “Well done, Qolweni community crime fighters for your passion, dedication, and drive to search and identifying a possible suspect in the Challenge Drive attack incident.","html":"Olivier wrote: “Well done, Qolweni community crime fighters for your passion, dedication, and drive to search and identifying a possible suspect in the Challenge Drive attack incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“A person was handed over to SAPS last night (Wednesday). Let us hope that this terrible incident ends up as a feel-good story in the end, a town focused and working together to fight crime. This beautiful place we all call home is not like any other town when it comes to people known as Plettonians.","html":"“A person was handed over to SAPS last night (Wednesday). Let us hope that this terrible incident ends up as a feel-good story in the end, a town focused and working together to fight crime. This beautiful place we all call home is not like any other town when it comes to people known as Plettonians."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The victims are in our prayers, hopefully in time, they will recover from this gruesome experience. I, for one, will always remember the 74-year-old man fighting back to protect his wife, he is for sure one of my heroes. Yours in security.”","html":"“The victims are in our prayers, hopefully in time, they will recover from this gruesome experience. I, for one, will always remember the 74-year-old man fighting back to protect his wife, he is for sure one of my heroes. Yours in security.”"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Attack on CCTV"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The shocking attack was caught on CCTV camera and has since gone viral on social media pages. The footage shows the man coming at the couple from behind and attempting to grab the woman’s handbag, but she holds on for dear life.","html":"The shocking attack was caught on CCTV camera and has since gone viral on social media pages. The footage shows the man coming at the couple from behind and attempting to grab the woman’s handbag, but she holds on for dear life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The attacker then starts hacking at the couple with a panga and pushes them to the ground, but they continue to put up a fight, refusing to let the bag go. Eventually the attacker runs off.","html":"The attacker then starts hacking at the couple with a panga and pushes them to the ground, but they continue to put up a fight, refusing to let the bag go. Eventually the attacker runs off."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The couple was taken to Mediclinic Plettenberg Bay by a member of the public where the woman was treated for cuts and a broken arm and her husband for cuts.","html":"The couple was taken to Mediclinic Plettenberg Bay by a member of the public where the woman was treated for cuts and a broken arm and her husband for cuts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Wyk said in a statement on Tuesday that Plettenberg Bay police were investigating a “robbery aggravated case”.","html":"Van Wyk said in a statement on Tuesday that Plettenberg Bay police were investigating a “robbery aggravated case”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Tuesday Plett’s new station commander, Col May, visited the victims in hospital and the scene, vowing to do everything possible to bring the perpetrator to justice.","html":"On Tuesday Plett’s new station commander, Col May, visited the victims in hospital and the scene, vowing to do everything possible to bring the perpetrator to justice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Update: Panga used in attack on Plett couple","Video shows brazen attack on couple in Plett"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
